office_does: The clerk maintains Superior Court records, receives filings and payments, supports court operations, and provides public access to case records.
race_blurb: Incumbent Staci Myklebust faces Ashley White; the available source set establishes Myklebust's court-administration tenure but little substantive information about White.

candidates.summary: White is a candidate for county clerk; the approved dossier sources do not establish an attributable administrative platform or experience record.
highlights: Current ballot status is verified, while policy and experience remain research gaps [S1][S2]

candidates.summary: Myklebust is the incumbent county clerk with a long record in the office and prior work expanding remote and paperless access.
highlights: Washington Courts and county records verify her incumbency [S1][S2]
An earlier official statement reported 17 years in the office and access-modernization work [S1]

experience.basis: Verified incumbency and a reported 17-year clerk-office career make her the established-record candidate.
